mapper.select: /* GoodsMapper.getGoodsMerchList: 상품 분류 목록 조회 */ SELECT GOODS_MERCH_ID , GOODS_MERCH_NM FROM GOODS_MERCH_BASE ORDER BY GOODS_MERCH_ID
/* GoodsMapper.getBrandList: 브랜드 목록 조회 */ SELECT BRAND_NO , BRAND_NM , BRAND_LOGO_PATH FROM BRAND_BASE WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' AND DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY DISP_ORD ASC, BRAND_NO ASC

/* GoodsMapper.getAdminGoodsDetail: 관리자 상품 상세 조회 */ SELECT GOODS_ID , GOODS_DIV_CD , GOODS_STAT_CD , GOODS_NM , GOODS_GROUP_ID , GOODS_MERCH_ID , SUPPLY_AMT , SALE_AMT , SHOW_YN , ERP_SUPPLY_AMT , ERP_COST_AMT , ERP_STYLE_CD , ERP_COLOR_CD , ERP_MERCH_CD FROM GOODS_BASE WHERE GOODS_ID = #{goodsId}

/* GoodsMapper.getAdminCategoryTreeList: 관리자 카테고리 트리 목록 조회 */ SELECT C1.CATEGORY_ID , C1.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID , C1.CATEGORY_LEVEL , C1.CATEGORY_NM , C1.DISP_ORD , C1.SHOW_YN , ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM CATEGORY C2 WHERE C2.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID = C1.CATEGORY_ID ) AS CHILD_COUNT FROM CATEGORY C1 ORDER BY C1.CATEGORY_LEVEL ASC, C1.DISP_ORD ASC, C1.CATEGORY_ID ASC
/* GoodsMapper.getAdminCategoryDetail: 관리자 카테고리 상세 조회 */ SELECT CATEGORY_ID , PARENT_CATEGORY_ID , CATEGORY_LEVEL , CATEGORY_NM , DISP_ORD , SHOW_YN FROM CATEGORY WHERE CATEGORY_ID = #{categoryId}

/* GoodsMapper.getAdminCategoryGoodsList: 카테고리별 상품 목록 조회 */ SELECT CG.CATEGORY_ID , CG.GOODS_ID , CG.DISP_ORD , GB.ERP_STYLE_CD , GB.GOODS_NM , GB.GOODS_STAT_CD , FN_GET_CODE_NM('GOODS_STAT', GB.GOODS_STAT_CD) AS GOODS_STAT_NM , GB.GOODS_DIV_CD , FN_GET_CODE_NM('GOODS_DIV', GB.GOODS_DIV_CD) AS GOODS_DIV_NM , ( SELECT GI.IMG_PATH FROM GOODS_IMG GI WHERE GI.GOODS_ID = GB.GOODS_ID ORDER BY GI.DISP_ORD ASC, GI.IMG_NO ASC LIMIT 1 ) AS IMG_PATH FROM CATEGORY_GOODS CG JOIN GOODS_BASE GB ON GB.GOODS_ID = CG.GOODS_ID WHERE CG.CATEGORY_ID = #{categoryId} ORDER BY CG.DISP_ORD ASC, CG.GOODS_ID ASC

/* GoodsMapper.countShopCategoryGoods: 쇼핑몰 카테고리 화면 상품 건수 조회 */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM CATEGORY_GOODS CG JOIN CATEGORY C ON C.CATEGORY_ID = CG.CATEGORY_ID AND C.SHOW_YN = 'Y' JOIN GOODS_BASE GB ON GB.GOODS_ID = CG.GOODS_ID AND GB.SHOW_YN = 'Y' AND GB.GOODS_STAT_CD = 'GOODS_STAT_02' AND GB.SALE_AMT >= 990 WHERE CG.CATEGORY_ID = #{categoryId}

/* GoodsMapper.getShopCategoryGoodsList: 쇼핑몰 카테고리 화면 상품 목록 페이징 조회 */ SELECT CG.CATEGORY_ID , CG.GOODS_ID , GB.GOODS_NM , BB.BRAND_NM , GB.SUPPLY_AMT , GB.SALE_AMT , ( SELECT GI.IMG_PATH FROM GOODS_IMG GI WHERE GI.GOODS_ID = CG.GOODS_ID ORDER BY GI.DISP_ORD ASC, GI.IMG_NO ASC LIMIT 1 ) AS IMG_PATH , ( SELECT GI.IMG_PATH FROM GOODS_IMG GI WHERE GI.GOODS_ID = CG.GOODS_ID ORDER BY GI.DISP_ORD ASC, GI.IMG_NO ASC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1 ) AS SECONDARY_IMG_PATH , CG.DISP_ORD FROM CATEGORY_GOODS CG JOIN CATEGORY C ON C.CATEGORY_ID = CG.CATEGORY_ID AND C.SHOW_YN = 'Y' JOIN GOODS_BASE GB ON GB.GOODS_ID = CG.GOODS_ID AND GB.SHOW_YN = 'Y' AND GB.GOODS_STAT_CD = 'GOODS_STAT_02' AND GB.SALE_AMT >= 990 LEFT JOIN BRAND_BASE BB ON BB.BRAND_NO = GB.BRAND_NO WHERE CG.CATEGORY_ID = #{categoryId} ORDER BY CG.DISP_ORD ASC, CG.GOODS_ID ASC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

/* GoodsMapper.getShopGoodsBasic: 쇼핑몰 상품상세 기본 상품 정보 조회 */ SELECT GB.GOODS_ID , GB.GOODS_NM , GB.GOODS_GROUP_ID , GB.BRAND_NO , BB.BRAND_NM , BB.BRAND_LOGO_PATH , BB.BRAND_NOTI , GB.ERP_COLOR_CD , GC.COLOR_NM , GC.COLOR_RGB , GB.SUPPLY_AMT , GB.SALE_AMT , GB.SHOW_YN , GB.GOODS_STAT_CD FROM GOODS_BASE GB LEFT JOIN BRAND_BASE BB ON BB.BRAND_NO = GB.BRAND_NO LEFT JOIN GOODS_COLOR GC ON GC.ERP_COLOR_CD = GB.ERP_COLOR_CD WHERE GB.GOODS_ID = #{goodsId} AND GB.SHOW_YN = 'Y' AND GB.GOODS_STAT_CD = 'GOODS_STAT_02' LIMIT 1
/* GoodsMapper.getShopGoodsImageList: 쇼핑몰 상품상세 이미지 목록 조회 */ SELECT IMG_NO , GOODS_ID , DISP_ORD , IMG_PATH FROM GOODS_IMG WHERE GOODS_ID = #{goodsId} ORDER BY DISP_ORD ASC, IMG_NO ASC

/* GoodsMapper.getShopGoodsSizeList: 쇼핑몰 상품상세 사이즈/재고 목록 조회 */ SELECT GOODS_ID , SIZE_ID , STOCK_QTY , ADD_AMT , DISP_ORD FROM GOODS_SIZE WHERE GOODS_ID = #{goodsId} AND DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY DISP_ORD ASC, SIZE_ID ASC

/* GoodsMapper.getShopGoodsGroupItemList: 쇼핑몰 상품상세 동일 그룹 상품 목록 조회 */ SELECT GB.GOODS_ID , GB.ERP_COLOR_CD , GC.COLOR_NM , GC.COLOR_RGB , ( SELECT GI.IMG_PATH FROM GOODS_IMG GI WHERE GI.GOODS_ID = GB.GOODS_ID ORDER BY GI.DISP_ORD ASC, GI.IMG_NO ASC LIMIT 1 ) AS FIRST_IMG_PATH FROM GOODS_BASE GB LEFT JOIN GOODS_COLOR GC ON GC.ERP_COLOR_CD = GB.ERP_COLOR_CD WHERE GB.GOODS_GROUP_ID = #{goodsGroupId} AND GB.SHOW_YN = 'Y' AND GB.GOODS_STAT_CD = 'GOODS_STAT_02' ORDER BY GB.GOODS_ID ASC
/* GoodsMapper.getShopGoodsDescItemList: 쇼핑몰 상품상세 기기별 설명 목록 조회 */ SELECT GOODS_ID , DEVICE_GB_CD , GOODS_DESC FROM GOODS_DESC WHERE GOODS_ID = #{goodsId} ORDER BY DEVICE_GB_CD ASC

/* GoodsMapper.countShopMypageWishGoods: 쇼핑몰 마이페이지 위시리스트 전체 건수 조회 */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM WISH_LIST WL JOIN GOODS_BASE GB ON GB.GOODS_ID = WL.GOODS_ID AND GB.SHOW_YN = 'Y' AND GB.GOODS_STAT_CD = 'GOODS_STAT_02' WHERE WL.CUST_NO = #{custNo}

/* GoodsMapper.getShopMypageWishGoodsList: 쇼핑몰 마이페이지 위시리스트 목록 페이징 조회 */ SELECT WL.CUST_NO , WL.GOODS_ID , GB.GOODS_NM , GB.SALE_AMT , ( SELECT GI.IMG_PATH FROM GOODS_IMG GI WHERE GI.GOODS_ID = WL.GOODS_ID ORDER BY GI.DISP_ORD ASC, GI.IMG_NO ASC LIMIT 1 ) AS IMG_PATH FROM WISH_LIST WL JOIN GOODS_BASE GB ON GB.GOODS_ID = WL.GOODS_ID AND GB.SHOW_YN = 'Y' AND GB.GOODS_STAT_CD = 'GOODS_STAT_02' WHERE WL.CUST_NO = #{custNo} ORDER BY WL.REG_DT DESC, WL.GOODS_ID DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

/* GoodsMapper.countShopMypageOwnedCoupon: 쇼핑몰 마이페이지 쿠폰함 사용 가능 보유 쿠폰 전체 건수 조회 */ SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CUSTOMER_COUPON CC JOIN COUPON_BASE CB ON CB.CPN_NO = CC.CPN_NO WHERE CC.CUST_NO = #{custNo} AND IFNULL(CC.CPN_USE_YN, 'N') = 'N' AND IFNULL(CB.DEL_YN, 'N') = 'N' AND CB.CPN_STAT_CD = 'CPN_STAT_02' AND NOW() >= CC.CPN_USABLE_START_DT AND NOW() <= CC.CPN_USABLE_END_DT

/* GoodsMapper.getShopMypageOwnedCouponPageList: 쇼핑몰 마이페이지 쿠폰함 사용 가능 보유 쿠폰 목록 페이징 조회 */ SELECT CC.CUST_CPN_NO , CC.CPN_NO , CB.CPN_NM , CB.CPN_GB_CD , CCG.CD_NM AS CPN_GB_NM , CB.CPN_DC_GB_CD , CB.CPN_DC_VAL , CB.CPN_TARGET_CD , CASE WHEN CC.CPN_USABLE_START_DT IS NULL OR CC.CPN_USABLE_START_DT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' THEN NULL ELSE CC.CPN_USABLE_START_DT END AS CPN_USABLE_START_DT , CASE WHEN CC.CPN_USABLE_END_DT IS NULL OR CC.CPN_USABLE_END_DT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' THEN NULL ELSE CC.CPN_USABLE_END_DT END AS CPN_USABLE_END_DT FROM CUSTOMER_COUPON CC JOIN COUPON_BASE CB ON CB.CPN_NO = CC.CPN_NO LEFT JOIN COMMON_CODE CCG ON CCG.GRP_CD = 'CPN_GB' AND CCG.CD = CB.CPN_GB_CD WHERE CC.CUST_NO = #{custNo} AND IFNULL(CC.CPN_USE_YN, 'N') = 'N' AND IFNULL(CB.DEL_YN, 'N') = 'N' AND CB.CPN_STAT_CD = 'CPN_STAT_02' AND NOW() >= CC.CPN_USABLE_START_DT AND NOW() <= CC.CPN_USABLE_END_DT ORDER BY CC.CUST_CPN_NO DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

/* GoodsMapper.countShopMypageDownloadableCoupon: 쇼핑몰 마이페이지 현재 다운로드 가능 쿠폰 전체 건수 조회 */ SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COUPON_BASE CB WHERE IFNULL(CB.DEL_YN, 'N') = 'N' AND CB.CPN_STAT_CD = 'CPN_STAT_02' AND IFNULL(CB.CPN_DOWN_ABLE_YN, 'Y') = 'Y' AND NOW() >= IFNULL(NULLIF(CB.CPN_DOWN_START_DT, '0000-00-00 00:00:00'), '1000-01-01 00:00:00') AND NOW() <= IFNULL(NULLIF(CB.CPN_DOWN_END_DT, '0000-00-00 00:00:00'), '9999-12-31 23:59:59')

/* GoodsMapper.getShopMypageDownloadableCouponPageList: 쇼핑몰 마이페이지 현재 다운로드 가능 쿠폰 목록 페이징 조회 */ SELECT CB.CPN_NO , CB.CPN_NM , CB.CPN_GB_CD , CCG.CD_NM AS CPN_GB_NM , CB.CPN_DC_GB_CD , CB.CPN_DC_VAL , CB.CPN_TARGET_CD , CASE WHEN CB.CPN_DOWN_START_DT IS NULL OR CB.CPN_DOWN_START_DT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' THEN NULL ELSE CB.CPN_DOWN_START_DT END AS CPN_DOWN_START_DT , CASE WHEN CB.CPN_DOWN_END_DT IS NULL OR CB.CPN_DOWN_END_DT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' THEN NULL ELSE CB.CPN_DOWN_END_DT END AS CPN_DOWN_END_DT , CB.CPN_USE_DT_GB , CB.CPN_USABLE_DT , CASE WHEN CB.CPN_USE_DT_GB = 'CPN_USE_DT_02' THEN NULLIF(CB.CPN_USE_START_DT, '0000-00-00 00:00:00') ELSE NULL END AS CPN_USE_START_DT , CASE WHEN CB.CPN_USE_DT_GB = 'CPN_USE_DT_02' THEN NULLIF(CB.CPN_USE_END_DT, '0000-00-00 00:00:00') ELSE NULL END AS CPN_USE_END_DT FROM COUPON_BASE CB LEFT JOIN COMMON_CODE CCG ON CCG.GRP_CD = 'CPN_GB' AND CCG.CD = CB.CPN_GB_CD WHERE IFNULL(CB.DEL_YN, 'N') = 'N' AND CB.CPN_STAT_CD = 'CPN_STAT_02' AND IFNULL(CB.CPN_DOWN_ABLE_YN, 'Y') = 'Y' AND NOW() >= IFNULL(NULLIF(CB.CPN_DOWN_START_DT, '0000-00-00 00:00:00'), '1000-01-01 00:00:00') AND NOW() <= IFNULL(NULLIF(CB.CPN_DOWN_END_DT, '0000-00-00 00:00:00'), '9999-12-31 23:59:59') ORDER BY CB.CPN_NO DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

/* GoodsMapper.getShopMypageDownloadableCouponList: 쇼핑몰 마이페이지 현재 다운로드 가능 쿠폰 목록 조회 */ SELECT CB.CPN_NO , CB.CPN_NM , CB.CPN_GB_CD , CCG.CD_NM AS CPN_GB_NM , CB.CPN_DC_GB_CD , CB.CPN_DC_VAL , CB.CPN_TARGET_CD , CASE WHEN CB.CPN_DOWN_START_DT IS NULL OR CB.CPN_DOWN_START_DT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' THEN NULL ELSE CB.CPN_DOWN_START_DT END AS CPN_DOWN_START_DT , CASE WHEN CB.CPN_DOWN_END_DT IS NULL OR CB.CPN_DOWN_END_DT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' THEN NULL ELSE CB.CPN_DOWN_END_DT END AS CPN_DOWN_END_DT , CB.CPN_USE_DT_GB , CB.CPN_USABLE_DT , CASE WHEN CB.CPN_USE_DT_GB = 'CPN_USE_DT_02' THEN NULLIF(CB.CPN_USE_START_DT, '0000-00-00 00:00:00') ELSE NULL END AS CPN_USE_START_DT , CASE WHEN CB.CPN_USE_DT_GB = 'CPN_USE_DT_02' THEN NULLIF(CB.CPN_USE_END_DT, '0000-00-00 00:00:00') ELSE NULL END AS CPN_USE_END_DT FROM COUPON_BASE CB LEFT JOIN COMMON_CODE CCG ON CCG.GRP_CD = 'CPN_GB' AND CCG.CD = CB.CPN_GB_CD WHERE IFNULL(CB.DEL_YN, 'N') = 'N' AND CB.CPN_STAT_CD = 'CPN_STAT_02' AND IFNULL(CB.CPN_DOWN_ABLE_YN, 'Y') = 'Y' AND NOW() >= IFNULL(NULLIF(CB.CPN_DOWN_START_DT, '0000-00-00 00:00:00'), '1000-01-01 00:00:00') AND NOW() <= IFNULL(NULLIF(CB.CPN_DOWN_END_DT, '0000-00-00 00:00:00'), '9999-12-31 23:59:59') ORDER BY CB.CPN_NO DESC

/* GoodsMapper.getShopCartItemList: 쇼핑몰 장바구니 목록 조회 */ SELECT C.CUST_NO , C.GOODS_ID , GB.BRAND_NO , GB.GOODS_NM , C.SIZE_ID , C.QTY , GB.SUPPLY_AMT , GB.SALE_AMT , ( SELECT GI.IMG_PATH FROM GOODS_IMG GI WHERE GI.GOODS_ID = C.GOODS_ID ORDER BY GI.DISP_ORD ASC, GI.IMG_NO ASC LIMIT 1 ) AS IMG_PATH FROM CART C JOIN GOODS_BASE GB ON GB.GOODS_ID = C.GOODS_ID WHERE C.CUST_NO = #{custNo} ORDER BY C.REG_DT DESC, C.GOODS_ID DESC, C.SIZE_ID ASC
/* GoodsMapper.getShopCartSiteInfo: 쇼핑몰 장바구니 사이트 배송 기준 정보 조회 */ SELECT SITE_ID , DELIVERY_FEE , DELIVERY_FEE_LIMIT FROM SITE_INFO WHERE SITE_ID = #{siteId} LIMIT 1
/* GoodsMapper.getShopGoodsSiteInfo: 쇼핑몰 상품상세 사이트 배송 기준 정보 조회 */ SELECT SITE_ID , SITE_NM , DELIVERY_FEE , DELIVERY_FEE_LIMIT FROM SITE_INFO WHERE SITE_ID = #{siteId} LIMIT 1

/* GoodsMapper.getShopActiveGoodsCouponList: 다운로드 가능한 상품쿠폰 목록 조회 */ SELECT CB.CPN_NO , CB.CPN_NM , CB.CPN_STAT_CD , CB.CPN_GB_CD , CB.CPN_TARGET_CD , CB.CPN_DC_GB_CD , CB.CPN_DC_VAL , CASE WHEN CB.CPN_DOWN_START_DT IS NULL OR CB.CPN_DOWN_START_DT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' THEN NULL ELSE DATE_FORMAT(CB.CPN_DOWN_START_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') END AS CPN_DOWN_START_DT , CASE WHEN CB.CPN_DOWN_END_DT IS NULL OR CB.CPN_DOWN_END_DT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' THEN NULL ELSE DATE_FORMAT(CB.CPN_DOWN_END_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') END AS CPN_DOWN_END_DT , CB.CPN_USE_DT_GB , CB.CPN_USABLE_DT , CASE WHEN CB.CPN_USE_START_DT IS NULL OR CB.CPN_USE_START_DT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' THEN NULL ELSE DATE_FORMAT(CB.CPN_USE_START_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') END AS CPN_USE_START_DT , CASE WHEN CB.CPN_USE_END_DT IS NULL OR CB.CPN_USE_END_DT = '0000-00-00 00:00:00' THEN NULL ELSE DATE_FORMAT(CB.CPN_USE_END_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') END AS CPN_USE_END_DT FROM COUPON_BASE CB WHERE IFNULL(CB.DEL_YN, 'N') = 'N' AND CB.CPN_STAT_CD = 'CPN_STAT_02' AND CB.CPN_GB_CD = 'CPN_GB_01' AND IFNULL(CB.CPN_DOWN_ABLE_YN, 'Y') = 'Y' AND NOW() >= IFNULL(NULLIF(CB.CPN_DOWN_START_DT, '0000-00-00 00:00:00'), '1000-01-01 00:00:00') AND NOW() <= IFNULL(NULLIF(CB.CPN_DOWN_END_DT, '0000-00-00 00:00:00'), '9999-12-31 23:59:59') ORDER BY CB.CPN_NO DESC
/* GoodsMapper.getShopCouponTargetList: 상품쿠폰 적용/제외 대상 목록 조회 */ SELECT CPN_NO , TARGET_GB_CD , TARGET_VALUE FROM COUPON_TARGET WHERE CPN_NO = #{cpnNo} ORDER BY TARGET_GB_CD ASC, TARGET_VALUE ASC

/* GoodsMapper.getShopCustomerCouponList: 고객의 현재 사용 가능한 보유 쿠폰 목록 조회 */ SELECT CC.CUST_CPN_NO , CC.CUST_NO , CC.CPN_NO , CB.CPN_NM , CB.CPN_STAT_CD , CB.CPN_GB_CD , CB.CPN_TARGET_CD , CB.CPN_DC_GB_CD , CB.CPN_DC_VAL , CC.CPN_USABLE_START_DT , CC.CPN_USABLE_END_DT FROM CUSTOMER_COUPON CC JOIN COUPON_BASE CB ON CB.CPN_NO = CC.CPN_NO WHERE CC.CUST_NO = #{custNo} AND IFNULL(CC.CPN_USE_YN, 'N') = 'N' AND IFNULL(CB.DEL_YN, 'N') = 'N' AND CB.CPN_STAT_CD = 'CPN_STAT_02' AND CB.CPN_GB_CD IN ('CPN_GB_01', 'CPN_GB_03', 'CPN_GB_04') AND NOW() >= CC.CPN_USABLE_START_DT AND NOW() <= CC.CPN_USABLE_END_DT ORDER BY CC.CUST_CPN_NO DESC

/* GoodsMapper.getCategoryChildren: 카테고리 하위 목록 조회 */ SELECT CATEGORY_ID , PARENT_CATEGORY_ID , CATEGORY_LEVEL , CATEGORY_NM , DISP_ORD , SHOW_YN FROM CATEGORY WHERE PARENT_CATEGORY_ID = #{parentCategoryId} ORDER BY DISP_ORD ASC, CATEGORY_ID ASC

/* GoodsMapper.getAdminGoodsCategoryList: 관리자 상품 카테고리 목록 조회 */ SELECT CG.GOODS_ID , CG.CATEGORY_ID , CG.DISP_ORD , CASE C.CATEGORY_LEVEL WHEN 1 THEN C.CATEGORY_ID WHEN 2 THEN P1.CATEGORY_ID WHEN 3 THEN P2.CATEGORY_ID END AS LEVEL1_ID , CASE C.CATEGORY_LEVEL WHEN 1 THEN NULL WHEN 2 THEN C.CATEGORY_ID WHEN 3 THEN P1.CATEGORY_ID END AS LEVEL2_ID , CASE C.CATEGORY_LEVEL WHEN 3 THEN C.CATEGORY_ID ELSE NULL END AS LEVEL3_ID FROM CATEGORY_GOODS CG JOIN CATEGORY C ON C.CATEGORY_ID = CG.CATEGORY_ID LEFT JOIN CATEGORY P1 ON P1.CATEGORY_ID = C.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID LEFT JOIN CATEGORY P2 ON P2.CATEGORY_ID = P1.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID WHERE CG.GOODS_ID = #{goodsId} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM CATEGORY CHILD JOIN CATEGORY_GOODS CHILD_CG ON CHILD_CG.CATEGORY_ID = CHILD.CATEGORY_ID WHERE CHILD.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID = CG.CATEGORY_ID AND CHILD_CG.GOODS_ID = CG.GOODS_ID ) ORDER BY CG.DISP_ORD ASC, CG.CATEGORY_ID ASC

/* GoodsMapper.getAdminGoodsSizeList: 관리자 상품 사이즈 목록 조회 */ SELECT GOODS_ID , SIZE_ID , STOCK_QTY , ADD_AMT , ERP_SYNC_YN , ERP_SIZE_CD , DISP_ORD , DEL_YN FROM GOODS_SIZE WHERE GOODS_ID = #{goodsId} AND DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY DISP_ORD ASC, SIZE_ID ASC

/* GoodsMapper.getAdminGoodsSizeDetail: 관리자 상품 사이즈 단건 조회 */ SELECT GOODS_ID , SIZE_ID , STOCK_QTY , ADD_AMT , ERP_SYNC_YN , ERP_SIZE_CD , DISP_ORD , DEL_YN FROM GOODS_SIZE WHERE GOODS_ID = #{goodsId} AND SIZE_ID = #{sizeId}
/* GoodsMapper.getAdminGoodsImageList: 관리자 상품 이미지 목록 조회 */ SELECT IMG_NO , GOODS_ID , DISP_ORD , IMG_PATH FROM GOODS_IMG WHERE GOODS_ID = #{goodsId} ORDER BY DISP_ORD ASC, IMG_NO ASC
/* GoodsMapper.getAdminGoodsImageByNo: 관리자 상품 이미지 단건 조회 */ SELECT IMG_NO , GOODS_ID , DISP_ORD , IMG_PATH FROM GOODS_IMG WHERE IMG_NO = #{imgNo}
